name: baseline
notes: Pure baseline anchor; reproduces the original repo defaults.

name: l1
notes: L1 loss instead of MSE — 37% improvement over baseline.

name: huber-pw
notes: Huber + extra L1 weight on surface p channel — same as L1 in practice.

name: onecycle-l1
notes: OneCycle 1e-3 + L1 — best of round 1 (44.9% improvement over baseline).

name: bf16
notes: MSE + bf16 — same epochs (60) but ~1.4× faster wall time. Result similar to L1 once normalized.

name: adagumbel
notes: Transolver++ slice routing with MSE — slightly worse than baseline. AB-UPT 2502.09692 also reported this hurts.

name: wider256
notes: Wider model only got 29 epochs in 125-min cap; 2.5x slower per epoch.

name: deep8
notes: Deeper model only got 37 epochs; ~1.6x slower per epoch. Could improve with more compute.

name: l1-ema
notes: L1 + cosine + EMA(0.999) + bf16 + grad_clip — 1.4% better than round-1 l1 (48.66) due to EMA.

name: l1-onecycle-ema
notes: ROUND-2 LEADER. L1 + OneCycle + EMA + bf16 + grad_clip — 8% better than round-1 onecycle-l1 (42.79).

name: l1-ema-noise
notes: L1 + cosine + EMA + input noise σ=0.005 — modest gain over plain l1-ema (42.33).

name: huber-pw-ema
notes: Huber + p_surf_weight=2 + EMA — slightly worse than plain l1-ema.

name: l1-ema-pw
notes: L1 + EMA + p_surf_weight=2 — slightly worse than plain l1-ema. p_surf_weight does not help on top of L1.

name: l1-ema-w192
notes: Round-2 winner before onecycle was added: wider model + L1 + cosine + EMA — 39.18.

name: l1-ema-deep7
notes: Depth 7 instead of 5 — modest gain over l1-ema (42.33→42.44).

name: l1-ema-ada
notes: Transolver++ slice routing on top of L1+EMA — slight regression.

name: l1-onecycle-ema-150
notes: Best recipe + 150 epochs — 32.99 (15.9% better than round-2 80-epoch version 39.33).

name: onecycle-ema-seed1
notes: Same recipe with seed=1 — small variance helps ensembling.

name: onecycle-ema-seed2
notes: ROUND-3 LEADER: same recipe with seed=2.

name: onecycle-ema-noise-150
notes: Adding input_noise σ=0.005 with longer training HURT — converged to higher value than no-noise.

name: onecycle-ema-noise-seed1
notes: Noise + seed1 — 32.14, similar to no-noise seed1; noise is roughly neutral with longer training.
